analysis:
Based on your framework analysis:

**CSPs**: None qualify - NVDA has decent setup but IVP 33% too low for premium selling per timing signal

**CCs on Existing Holdings**: 
- AMZN $265 strike, 2026-06-05, 35 DTE, $6.50/$6.80 bid/ask, 0.40 delta, 27.0% annualized (but quality fails - 15.1% above MA50)
- AAPL $280 strike, 2026-06-18, 48 DTE, $7.35/$7.45 bid/ask, 0.40 delta, 20.7% annualized 
- GOOGL $390 strike, 2026-06-18, 48 DTE, $11.10/$11.50 bid/ask, 0.39 delta, 22.9% annualized (but quality fails - 19.5% above MA50)

**LEAPS**: None qualify - All showing WAIT signals due to falling trends, elevated IVP, or quality issues

**PMCCs**: None available

**Bull Call Spreads**: None qualify

**IVP Environment**: Mixed volatility regime - Core names like NVDA/AAPL showing moderate IVP 33-60%, but quality leaders like AMZN/GOOGL extended above MA50, while beaten-down MSFT has high 84% IVP but still falling technically.
